info.title: Rundeck API
info.description: Rundeck API for job scheduling and runbook automation. Provides endpoints for managing jobs, executions, projects, system configuration, storage, users, and metrics.

get.summary: List the jobs that exist for a project

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project name

parameters.name: idList
parameters.description: Comma separated list of Job IDs to include

parameters.name: groupPath
parameters.description: Group or partial group path to include all jobs within that group path. Set to the special value "-" to match the top level jobs only.

parameters.name: jobFilter
parameters.description: A filter for the job name. Matches any job name that contains this value.

parameters.name: jobExactFilter
parameters.description: An exact job name to match.

parameters.name: groupPathExact
parameters.description: An exact group path to match. Set to the special value "-" to match the top level jobs only.

parameters.name: scheduledFilter
parameters.description: Specify whether to return only scheduled or only not scheduled jobs.

parameters.name: serverNodeUUIDFilter
parameters.description: In cluster mode, use to select scheduled jobs assigned to the server with the given UUID.

200.description: Expected response to a valid request

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID

200.description: Expected response for a valid request

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Job ID

post.summary: Retry a failed job execution on failed nodes only or on the same as the execution. This is the same functionality as the `Retry Failed Nodes ...` button on the execution page.

200.description: Exected response to a valid request.

post.summary: Delete multiple job definitions at once
Enable executions for a job. (ACL requires toggle_execution action for a job.)
Disable all executions for a job (scheduled or manual). (ACL requires toggle_execution action for a job.)
Enable the schedule for a job. (ACL requires toggle_schedule action for a job.)
Disable the schedule for a job. (ACL requires toggle_schedule action for a job.)

get.summary: Get the status of an execution by ID
Get detail about the node and step state of an execution by ID. The execution can be currently running or completed.
List input files for an execution
List job executions

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Project name or * for all projects

get.summary: Query for Executions based on Job or Execution details

parameters.name: abortedbyFilter
parameters.description: Username who aborted an execution

parameters.name: userFilter
parameters.description: Username who started the execution

parameters.name: recentFilter
parameters.description:
Use a simple text format to filter executions that completed within a period of time. The format is “XY” where X is an integer, and “Y” is one of:
* h: hour
* d: day

parameters.name: olderFilter
parameters.description: (same format as recentFilter) return executions that completed before the specified relative period of time

parameters.name: begin
parameters.description: Specify exact date for earliest execution completion time

parameters.name: executionIds
parameters.description: A list (comma-separated) of execution IDs. If this is specified then the archive will contain only executions that are specified, and will not contain Jobs, ACLs, or project configuration/readme files.

get.summary: Get key material at the specified PATH
get.description:
This enpoint is impossible to describe properly in OAPI 2.0 .  
Depending on resources type and accepts header GET can return a list of key metadata,
single metadata, or the key contents.

parameters.name: keyPath
parameters.description: Key path

404.description: No content found at this location

totalCount.description: Total number of storage requests (currently queued plus previously processed)

incompleteCount.description: Number of storage requests which have not completed successfully

missingCount.description: Number of executions for this cluster node which have no associated storage requests

IncompleteFileType.description: Comma-separated list of filetypes which have not be uploaded, e.g. rdlog,state.json. Types are rdlog (log output), state.json (workflow state data), execution.xml (execution definition)

requestCount.description: The number of job IDs that were in the delete request.

contents.description: Policy as JSON encoded YAML string

argString.description: Argument string to pass to the job, of the form `-opt value -opt2 value ...`

asUser.description: A username identifying the user who ran the job. Requires `runAs` permission.

options.description: Option value for option named `OPTNAME`. If specified the `argString` value is ignored (*API v18* or later).

argString.description: Argument string to pass to the job, of the form `-opt value -opt2 value ...`

asUser.description: A username identifying the user who ran the job. Requires `runAs` permission.

runAtTime.description: Specify a time to run the job (*API v18* or later). `ISO-8601` format with optional milliseconds.

options.description: Option value for option named `OPTNAME`. If specified the `argString` value is ignored (*API v18* or later).

ExecutionStateState.description: State value as used in execution state output
